faq.title: Questions we hear all the time.

items.q: How does the free trial work?
items.a: 14 days with full access to all features. No credit card. If you don't want to continue, simply don't enter payment details.

items.q: Can I migrate from another system?
items.a: Yes. We import patients, history and schedule from Excel, Dentrix, Dentalink, Clinicorp and others. Onboarding team assists you.

items.q: Does Sofía really book in my calendar?
items.a: Yes. Uses function calling against your real database. Checks availability, creates the appointment, respects conflicts, can reschedule or cancel.

items.q: Does AI replace the dentist for diagnosis?
items.a: No. AI assists diagnosis by pointing out visible findings. Clinical decision is always yours. Full legal audit trail is kept.

items.q: Is my data safe?
items.a: True multi-tenant with org isolation. Encryption in transit and at rest. We comply with HIPAA-ready practices, LGPD (Brazil) and GDPR (Europe).

items.q: What if I need support?
items.a: Direct WhatsApp chat with the team. Professional plan includes business-hours support. Corporate is 24/7 with SLA.

items.q: Does it work in my country?
items.a: SuperClini runs in 9 countries: US, Chile, Brazil, Colombia, Argentina, Mexico, Peru, Spain and Portugal. Each with local currency, compliance and language.

items.q: Can I cancel anytime?
items.a: Yes. No contracts, no penalties, no fine print. Cancel from the panel and keep access until the end of the paid period.

ctaFinal.title: Start today. 14 days free.
ctaFinal.sub: No card. No commitment. With our team alongside you in setup.

footer.tagline: The dental platform with native AI — built for practices that want to grow without chaos.

privacy.metaDescription: How SuperClini collects, uses and protects your personal data under Chile (Ley 19.628), Brazil (LGPD), and EU (GDPR).
privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: At SuperClini we handle personal data with transparency and accountability. This policy explains what we collect on superclini.com and our commercial forms, why we do it, and what rights you have. Operations inside the product (EHR, payments, DICOM) are covered by the Data Processing Agreement signed with each contracting clinic.

who.title: 1. Who we are
who.body: SuperClini / DentAI Studio is operated by SuperClini SpA (Chile). We act as the data controller for information we collect through this website. For clinical data processed inside the product, SuperClini acts as a data processor on behalf of each contracting clinic (controller).

what.title: 2. What we collect
what.body: Through the contact form: name, email, phone, clinic name (optional), country, team size (optional), interest type, and free-text message. Automatically: IP address, browser user-agent, origin URL, and UTM parameters when applicable. We do not collect clinical data via the public site — that is handled exclusively inside the product under a separate agreement.

why.title: 3. Why we use the data
why.body:
To respond to your commercial inquiry and qualify your interest in the platform.
To send you information about features, pricing, and product updates (only if you consented).
To comply with legal and accounting obligations.
To prevent fraud and abuse of the website.

legal.title: 4. Legal basis
legal.body:
Explicit consent of the data subject (form checkbox) — Ley 19.628 (Chile), LGPD art. 7, I (Brazil), GDPR art. 6(1)(a) (EU).
Legitimate interest for fraud prevention and site security — GDPR art. 6(1)(f), LGPD art. 7, IX.
Compliance with legal obligations when applicable — GDPR art. 6(1)(c), LGPD art. 7, II.

rights.title: 5. Your rights
rights.body: You may at any time request: access to your data, correction, deletion, portability, withdrawal of consent, and objection to processing. Just email us at privacy@superclini.com from your registered address. We respond within 15 business days (Chile), 15 days (Brazil, LGPD), or 1 month (GDPR).

retention.title: 6. Retention
retention.body: Commercial leads: up to 24 months since last contact — after that they are automatically anonymized or deleted. Data required by law (contracts, invoicing): kept for the applicable legal term.

security.title: 7. Security
security.body: We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures: TLS on all traffic, irreversible password hashing, role-based access control, audit logs, encrypted backups. Site and product are hosted on providers with ISO 27001 and SOC 2 certifications.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies and similar technologies
cookies.body: We use essential cookies to run the site (language preference, detected country). We don't use third-party advertising tracking cookies without your consent. Analytics runs with anonymized IP and no personal identifiers.

transfer.title: 9. International transfers
transfer.body: Some of our infrastructure providers (hosting, transactional email) are located outside Chile and Brazil. When international transfer happens, we ensure equivalent protection via standard contractual clauses (GDPR SCC) or adequacy decisions.

contact.title: 10. Contact
contact.body:
To exercise your rights or ask questions about this policy: privacy@superclini.com.
Controller: SuperClini SpA, Chile.

dpo.title: Data Protection Officer (DPO)
dpo.body: For specific data-protection queries, write to dpo@superclini.com.

meta.title: Sofía — AI WhatsApp Assistant for Dental Practices
meta.description: Sofía answers, books and triages your WhatsApp 24/7. 12 AI functions wired to your real schedule. Stop losing leads at midnight and on weekends.

hero.h1: Sofía answers your WhatsApp 24/7. You handle the patient.
hero.sub: AI agent with 12 real functions wired to your schedule. Books, confirms, reschedules and answers questions — in English, Spanish and Portuguese. Never miss a lead at 3 AM.

messages.user1: Good evening, I'd like to book a cleaning for my son.
messages.bot1: Good evening, I'm Sofía from the practice. How old is the patient?
messages.user2: 8 years old. Got anything Saturday morning?
messages.bot2: I have 9:00 and 10:30 with Dr. Carolina, our pediatric specialist. Which works for you?
messages.bot3: Done. Booked for Saturday 10:30 with Dr. Carolina. I'll send a reminder Friday. ✨

1.title: Connect your WhatsApp Business
1.desc: Scan the QR once. No new number. No extra app.

2.title: Sofía learns your schedule
2.desc: Imports providers, hours, specialties, plans. In seconds.

3.title: Answers day, night and weekends
3.desc: Books, confirms, reschedules, answers. You just see the outcome.

4.title: Hands off what needs you
4.desc: Clinical question, urgency, complaint — Sofía hands over with full context.

feature1.title: Sofía isn't a chatbot. It's an agent with tools.
feature1.description: Every interaction queries your real database and executes a concrete action. No generic answers, no 'one moment' that never ends.
bullets: Look up patient by name or phone
List providers and specialties
Check available slots in real time
Create appointment with instant confirmation
Reschedule or cancel with reason
Same-day attendance confirmation
Answer about plans and payment methods
Register new patient (name, ID, age)
Look up practice info (address, hours)
List procedure catalog
Recognize patient by phone (WhatsApp LID)
Escalate to human on complex cases

feature2.title: Knows your schedule in real time.
feature2.description: Not a copy. Not a cache. Sofía hits your database every conversation. Conflicts are caught before they're problems.
bullets: Instant sync: block in calendar → unavailable on WhatsApp
Respects practice timezone (configurable per location)
Multi-provider and multi-operatory support
Auto-language: patient writes EN → Sofía answers EN
WhatsApp LID (linked devices) support with smart fallback

solo.pain: You treat and answer WhatsApp at the same time.
solo.benefit: Sofía answers while you're in the patient's mouth. You don't lose leads — and you don't interrupt the procedure.

clinic.pain: Your front desk answers 30 messages a day. When she's out, nobody sees WhatsApp.
clinic.benefit: Sofía complements your team in hours and covers 100% off-hours. Filters simple questions before they become human tasks.

network.pain: Each site has its own WhatsApp, no standard reply, no tracking.
network.benefit: Sofía centralizes intake and routes per site, respecting local schedule. One standard, comparable metrics.

comparison.title: Your WhatsApp with Sofía vs without

horario.after: 24/7. Late nights, Sundays, holidays — never sleeps.

resposta.before: 5 min to 4 hours depending on workload.

agenda.before: You open the calendar, check, copy, paste, confirm.
agenda.after: Sofía hits the real schedule, books and confirms. You just see the result.

leads.after: 0%. Sofía books an appointment at 3 AM if needed.

secretaria.after: Drops to 10%. They focus on the people in front of them.

items.q: Does Sofía actually book in my schedule or just pretend?
items.a: Books for real. Every appointment Sofía creates appears in your schedule immediately, with patient, provider, time and procedure. Conflicts are caught before saving.

items.q: Which languages does Sofía speak?
items.a: Spanish (trained in neutral LATAM ES). Brazilian Portuguese automatically when the patient writes in PT. English also supported. Detection is per message — patient switches language and Sofía follows.

items.q: What if a patient asks a clinical question Sofía can't answer?
items.a: Sofía recognizes the limit and escalates to human with full context. You configure a keyword (e.g. 'urgent') that triggers immediate handoff.

items.q: How does it work with new vs existing patients?
items.a: Sofía looks up by phone (WhatsApp LID). Existing: addresses by name, knows history. New: registers on the spot — asks for name, ID, age. Appointment is created with a valid patient.

items.q: Can I turn Sofía off at specific times?
items.a: Yes. You define hours where Sofía answers vs. hands off. Default is 24/7. Configurable per location.

items.q: How much per message?
items.a: No per-message charge. Advanced plan includes 300 unique conversations/month (1 conversation = 1 unique patient interacting). Add-on packs available for higher volume.

items.q: Does Sofía recognize who's already in our system?
items.a: Yes — looks up by WhatsApp phone and matches against your patient base. If recognized, addresses by name and has context. If new number, registers them.

items.q: How long does activation take?
items.a: 1 business day. Our team connects your WhatsApp Business, configures your schedule and hours, and tests with you before flipping the switch.

ctaFinal.title: Stop losing leads on WhatsApp.
ctaFinal.sub: Guided activation by our team in 1 business day. 14-day trial, no credit card.

meta.title: Clinical AI — Smile simulation and AI radiograph analysis
meta.description: Visual AI built into the patient chart: simulates smiles before treatment and assists analysis of panoramic, cephalometric, bitewing and periapical radiographs. Full legal audit trail.

hero.h1: Your AI sees what the dentist sees — and helps you explain.
hero.sub: Smile simulation in seconds to close more cases in the first visit. AI-assisted radiograph analysis with hot spots. All inside the chart, with full legal audit trail.

howItWorks.title: From photo to plan in 4 clicks

1.title: Upload the image
1.desc: Front photo of the patient for smile, or radiograph (PNG/JPEG/WEBP) for analysis.

2.title: AI processes
2.desc: Gemini reads the image in seconds. Multi-treatment (veneers + whitening + orthodontics) in a single request.

3.title: You review
3.desc: Result inside the chart, with AI confidence score and automatic medical-legal disclaimer.

4.title: Show the patient
4.desc: Side-by-side display, saved in the case and auditable. Optional digital acceptance on the spot.

smile.title: The patient sees the result before saying yes.
smile.description: Drastically increases first-visit case acceptance. Gemini Flash 3.1 model with dynamic prompt that combines multiple treatments (veneers, whitening, orthodontics) into a coherent simulation.
bullets: Multi-treatment in one simulation
Result in seconds (120s timeout, automatic retry)
1024×1024 high-quality images
Built-in medical-legal disclaimer (doesn't promise exact result)
Saved on the patient case — visible in the chart
Works on desktop, tablet and dentist's phone

radio.title: AI assists diagnosis. You decide.
radio.description: Assisted detection on panoramic, cephalometric, bitewing and periapical radiographs. AI flags visible findings with transparency on confidence — clinical decision is always yours, with full legal audit trail.
bullets: 4 types: panoramic, cephalometric, bitewing, periapical
Caries in 3 grades (incipient / moderate / advanced)
Periapical lesions and periodontal status
Cephalometry with Ricketts, Steiner and McNamara (values vs norms)
PNG, JPEG and WEBP supported
Audit trail — who analyzed, when, with which model

useCases.title: Who wins most with visual AI

solo.pain: You spend 20min explaining a treatment and the patient decides later.
solo.benefit: Show the simulation on the spot. Close more cases first visit. No need to invest in intraoral camera.

clinic.pain: Every dentist reads radiographs their own way.
clinic.benefit: AI standardizes initial diagnosis. Legal audit of who saw what. Cases shared between providers.

network.pain: No clinical standard across sites — each location with its own quality.
network.benefit: Same AI model across all locations. Single standard for simulation and analysis. Comparable acceptance metrics.

comparison.title: Your visit with visual AI vs without

aceitacao.before: Patient will think about it and rarely returns.
aceitacao.after: Patient sees the result and decides on the spot.

tempo.before: 15-25min with generic photos and pen drawings on the chart.

diagnostico.before: Isolated clinical eye, no second opinion.
diagnostico.after: AI flags visible findings, you decide with more context.

auditoria.after: Automatic trail: who saw, when, with which AI model.

items.q: Does AI replace the dentist for diagnosis?
items.a: No. AI assists diagnosis by flagging visible findings in the image — caries at stage X, suggested lesion at site Y. Clinical decision is always the dentist's. Every analysis is logged with full legal audit: who saw, when, with which AI model.

items.q: What images does the smile simulation accept?
items.a: Front photo of the patient (smiling, natural open mouth). PNG, JPEG or WEBP. AI generates a 1024×1024 image showing the simulated result with selected treatments (veneers, whitening, orthodontics — combined or isolated).

items.q: How long does a simulation take?
items.a: Typically 30-60 seconds. Max 120s timeout with 2 automatic retries. If the model is under load, expect a small queue. You're not stuck on the screen — the result appears in the patient case when ready.

items.q: Which radiographs does AI analyze?
items.a: Panoramic, cephalometric, bitewing and periapical. Formats: PNG, JPEG, WEBP. Native DICOM not yet supported — for CBCT 3D, use the integrated DICOM 3D viewer (which is manual, not AI-driven).

items.q: Do plans have monthly AI quotas?
items.a: Yes. Professional plan includes monthly quotas of simulations and radiograph analyses. Advanced plan has higher quotas. Corporate plan is custom. Add-on packs available for higher volume.

items.q: Does the simulation guarantee the real treatment result?
items.a: No. Every simulation includes an automatic medical-legal disclaimer: 'Educational simulation — real result depends on biological and technical variables'. Use it to align expectations, never as a contract or clinical promise.

items.q: Is it safe for LGPD/GDPR?
items.a: Yes. Images are sent for processing via encrypted API (TLS), we don't train public models on your data, and they're stored isolated per organization. Full legal audit per analysis.

items.q: Does it work offline?
items.a: No. AI needs connection to process. But the flow is async: you upload the image, close the screen if you want, and the result appears in the case when ready.

ctaFinal.title: Your practice closes more cases with visual explanation and AI-assisted diagnosis.
ctaFinal.sub: 14-day trial with full AI active. Sales-led setup in 1 business day.

meta.title: Clinical Module — Tooth chart, immutable EHR, DICOM 3D and exams
meta.description: Everything your practice needs: interactive FDI tooth chart, immutable EHR (HIPAA-ready/LGPD), in-browser DICOM 3D viewer with 6 dental presets, 2D exams and aligners. All connected.

hero.h1: Your practice in 1 tool. No spreadsheets. No paper.
hero.sub: Interactive FDI tooth chart, immutable EHR per regulation, in-browser DICOM 3D viewer, 2D exams and aligners. All connected, with prescription templates and full legal audit trail.

howItWorks.title: From registration to billing in 4 steps

1.title: Register the patient
1.desc: Demographics + structured anamnesis (allergies, meds, conditions). Supports SSN/CPF/RUT per country.

2.title: Treat with tooth chart + EHR
2.desc: 32 teeth in FDI standard. Status per surface. Immutable clinical notes (HIPAA-ready/LGPD).

3.title: Attach exams
3.desc: Intraoral photos (9 standard slots), 2D radiographs, CBCT 3D via DICOM, aligner series.

4.title: Bill with legal audit
4.desc: Prescription template with 11 variables. Audit trail of who saw/edited what, when.

odonto.title: International FDI standard. Legally immutable EHR.
odonto.description: 32 teeth in FDI system (11-48), interactive — click to change status. Clinical notes immutable per HIPAA-ready, LGPD and Ley 20.584 (Chile) — only super-admin can invalidate with logged reason.
bullets: International FDI system (11-48), worldwide clinical standard
Status per tooth surface (V/P/L/D/O), zoom on mobile
Legally immutable notes — invalidation only by super-admin with reason
Structured anamnesis: allergies, meds, chronic conditions
Prescription template with 11 variables ({{patient_name}}, {{provider_id}} etc.)
Partial PATCH auto-save — nothing is lost

dicom.title: CBCT viewer in your browser. Nothing to install.
dicom.description: Native Cornerstone3D, WebGL GPU with 512MB cache. 6 dental presets (Hueso, Implante, Tejido, Endo, Estándar). 7 professional tools (measurements, ROI, HU Probe). Chunked upload for >50MB CBCTs.
bullets: 6 W/L presets in Spanish (Hueso 500/2500, Implante 800/3500, Tejido, Endo)
7 tools: Length, Angle, EllipticalROI, RectangleROI, Bidirectional, ArrowAnnotate, HU Probe
>50MB chunked upload with automatic reassembly
SeriesInstanceUID + slice dimension validation
WebGL GPU + 512MB cache
Works on desktop, touch tablets

exame.title: 9-photo protocol + aligners connected to the lab.
exame.description: Standardized 9-slot intraoral protocol. Full aligner series with external lab integration. MIME validation per upload, storage per plan.
bullets: 9 intraoral photo types (intraorals, occlusals, profile)
Aligners: series, sessions, milestones
External lab integration via CasoAlineador.laboratorioId
MIME validation per upload (PNG/JPEG/WEBP)
Storage: 5GB Essential · 50GB Professional · 100GB Advanced · custom Corporate
All inside the patient case — search by exam or date

useCases.title: Who wins most with the clinical module

solo.pain: Paper piling up, EHR in Excel, exams in a phone folder.
solo.benefit: All in one place. Access from chair-side tablet, from your phone outside the practice. Automatic legal compliance.

especialista.pain: You need DICOM 3D but Sidexis/Romexis costs $3-6k in licenses.
especialista.benefit: Native DICOM 3D viewer in the browser, no extra license. 6 dental presets preconfigured. >50MB CBCT uploads via chunked upload.

clinica.pain: Every specialist charts differently. Audit is fragmented.
clinica.benefit: Single chart standard. Legally immutable notes. Centralized audit of who saw/edited.

papel.before: Excel sheet, paper or installed desktop software.
papel.after: Multi-tenant cloud. Access from any device with login.

dicom.after: Built-in native browser viewer. Cornerstone3D + 6 dental presets.

legal.before: Manual: you note what you can/should somewhere.
legal.after: Automatic immutability + audit trail by default.

mobile.before: Doesn't work or separate heavy app.
mobile.after: Responsive PWA. Works on chair-side tablet, dentist's phone.

custo.before: Base software + DICOM viewer + extra modules = $200-500/mo.

items.q: Is there a periodontal chart?
items.a: Not yet as a dedicated module. It's on the roadmap for next phases. As a workaround, use 'control note' templates that accept structured measurements (pocket depth, bleeding, plaque).

items.q: Which CBCT brands does DICOM work with?
items.a: Any equipment that exports standard DICOM (DICM magic): Carestream, Planmeca, Sirona, Vatech, Newtom, etc. We validate SeriesInstanceUID and slice dimensions on import.

items.q: Can I do MPR or Volume Rendering?
items.a: Not in the current version. DICOM Viewer uses Stack Viewport (1 slice at a time, scroll to navigate). MPR and Volume Rendering are on the roadmap — depends on an open issue in Cornerstone3D v4.

items.q: How does clinical notes work legally?
items.a: Immutable by default. Once saved, can't be edited — only a new note with reference to the previous one is allowed. Only super-admin can mark a note as invalid (with logged reason and timestamp). Per HIPAA-ready, LGPD and Ley 20.584 (CL).

items.q: Does it work offline?
items.a: No. The system is multi-tenant cloud — requires connection. In return: automatic backup, multi-device sync, zero risk of losing chart from a dead drive.

items.q: Does it work on iPad and Android tablets?
items.a: Yes. Responsive PWA. The tooth chart has zoom and touch gestures optimized. DICOM Viewer works with pinch-to-zoom and pan on tablet.

items.q: Can I import from Dentalink or another system?
items.a: Yes. We have 12 import adapters (patient, schedule, plan, receivable, notes, tooth chart, etc.). Legal immutability is preserved — imported notes keep original date and are flagged as migrated.

items.q: How many active patients per plan?
items.a: Unlimited in all plans. What varies is storage (5GB Essential, 50GB Professional, 100GB Advanced, custom Corporate) and number of active providers.

ctaFinal.title: Everything you need to practice — without installing a thing.
ctaFinal.sub: 14-day trial with full clinical module. Sales-led setup in 1 business day.

meta.title: Self-service Kiosk — Front-desk check-in, scheduling and consent
meta.description: Touch tablet that frees up your front desk: patients identify with ID, see their next appointment, check in, book a new slot and digitally sign consent. No queue.

hero.sub: Touch tablet where patients identify themselves, check in, book appointments and digitally sign consent. Your receptionist focuses on what matters: people who need human attention.

howItWorks.title: From arrival to chair in 4 steps

1.title: Patient arrives
1.desc: Friendly home screen on the tablet, in English/Spanish/Portuguese based on country.

2.title: Identifies
2.desc: Types SSN/RUT/CPF on the touch numpad. System finds the patient in seconds.

3.title: Checks in or books
3.desc: Sees confirmed next appointment or picks a new available slot with the right provider.

4.title: Signs consent
4.desc: HIPAA-ready/LGPD compliant. Digital signature saved as base64 in the case, with legal audit trail.

checkin.title: Check-in, scheduling and queue — all on the tablet.
checkin.description: Patient recognized by ID, next appointment confirmed with one tap. New patients register on the spot. Queue is managed automatically.
bullets: Identification by SSN/RUT/CPF/NIT (per-country format)
Recognizes existing patient in seconds (search + match)
Registers new patient on the kiosk (name + ID + age)
Confirms scheduled appointment with one tap
Allows rescheduling to available slot in real time
Queue position visible, automatic updates

consent.title: Digital signature with full legal audit trail.
consent.description: Consent forms (anesthesia, procedure, photography, LGPD) signed by the patient's finger on the tablet. Saved as base64 linked to the case, with timestamp and IP — compliant with HIPAA-ready, LGPD and Ley 20.584 (Chile).
bullets: Pre-configured forms (anesthesia, procedure, photography, LGPD/GDPR)
Touch canvas signature (finger or stylus)
Saved as immutable base64 in patient case
Timestamp + IP + UserAgent for legal audit
Compliant with HIPAA-ready, LGPD, GDPR, Ley 20.584
PDF auto-generated for download/print

useCases.title: Who wins most with the kiosk

alto.pain: Front desk overwhelmed with 50-100 check-ins/day. Queue at the counter.
alto.benefit: 60% of check-ins go self-service. Receptionist focuses on people who actually need human help.

luxo.pain: Wants a differentiated experience — but the receptionist can't do it all alone.
luxo.benefit: Apple Store-style experience. Patient walks in, identifies on the tablet, sees estimated time, gets a coffee.

rede.pain: Service standard varies across locations. No comparable metrics.
rede.benefit: Same check-in flow at every location. Comparable wait-time and no-show metrics.

comparison.title: Traditional front desk vs with kiosk

tempo.after: 30-60s — patient does it solo on arrival.

fila.before: Patient stands without knowing their turn.
fila.after: Tablet shows position in real time.

dados.before: Receptionist types it all at the counter (5-10min).
dados.after: Patient fills it in solo (2min) — receptionist validates later.

consent.before: Printed paper, pen signature, optional scan.
consent.after: Digital signature with timestamp + IP, immutable base64 in the case.

recep.before: 100% of time on check-in + registrations + consents.
recep.after: 40% — focuses on complex patients, calls, special bookings.

items.q: What hardware do I need?
items.a: Touch tablet (iPad or Android) or Mac Mini + 15-22" touch monitor. The app is web/PWA — runs on any device with up-to-date Chrome/Safari and a touch screen. We recommend Mac Mini + standing monitor for high-volume practices.

items.q: Does it work offline?
items.a: No. Requires constant connection (queries real schedule, saves consent, syncs queue).

items.q: How much does the hardware cost?
items.a: Basic iPad ~$350. Mac Mini + touch monitor setup ~$1,200. You decide what to buy — our part is just the software, included in Professional+ plans.

items.q: Is there a kiosk for the operatory (not front desk)?
items.a: It's in development (Phase 2). Current version covers 100% front desk: identification, scheduling, queue, consent. Operatory kiosk (chart visualization in the kiosk in front of the chair) ships in Q3.

items.q: Does it accept payment directly on the kiosk?
items.a: Not yet. Integrated payment via gateway is on the roadmap. For now, payment continues at the traditional front desk or via QR shown by the receptionist.

items.q: How does it work with new patients?
items.a: Patient types ID, system doesn't find them → kiosk offers quick registration (name + age + phone). Registration is pending receptionist validation (no conflict with existing patients).

items.q: What languages does the kiosk support?
items.a: Spanish, Portuguese and English. Detects the country language (Brazil = PT, US = EN, others = ES) automatically. Configurable per location.

items.q: Is the digital consent legally valid?
items.a: Yes. Digital signature + timestamp + IP + UserAgent + immutable base64 in the case is valid evidence per HIPAA-ready, LGPD and Ley 20.584 (CL). Auto-generated PDF for download/print if you prefer a physical backup.

ctaFinal.title: Your front desk frees up 60% of its time. Without firing anyone.
ctaFinal.sub: 14-day trial with kiosk active. Sales-led setup in 1 business day — no hardware required, runs on any tablet.

meta.title: Automations — Cash close, payouts and recurring billing (MercadoPago)
meta.description: Daily cash closes itself via cron. Provider payouts calculated per period. Memberships with automatic recurring billing (MercadoPago) and escalated reminders. Sleeps when you sleep.

hero.h1: Your practice bills. While you sleep.
hero.sub: Daily cash closes itself. Provider payouts calculated per period. Memberships with automatic recurring billing via gateway. Escalated WhatsApp+Email reminders — no missed dues.

1.title: Set rates
1.desc: Provider commission %, membership plans, payment gateway (MercadoPago).

2.title: Treat and close cases
2.desc: Each progressed service updates cash, commission and receivables in real time.

3.title: Cron runs overnight
3.desc: Cash closes at 11pm. Recurring billing at 3am. Reminders at 10am. All in UTC.

4.title: You see the summary
4.desc: Morning: dashboard with closed cash, updated MRR, processed charges, failures with scheduled retry.

caixa.title: Daily cash closes itself. You just review.
caixa.description: MovimentoCaixa logs each in (visit, wire, card) and out (supplier, payout) in real time. Closing cron runs at midnight — day's balance consolidated, ready to review in the morning.
bullets: Movements logged in real time as services progress
Automatic closing cron (configurable per location)
Calculated balance: in - out - payroll = real cash
Multiple payment methods (PIX, card, wire, OXXO, PSE, Yape, Bizum)
Manual reopen allowed with logged reason
Closing history per month

liquidacao.title: Each provider's commission calculated per period.
liquidacao.description: Set commission % per provider (or override per insurance). Every progressed service generates a Liquidacao item automatically. End of month, you close the period and pay — no spreadsheet, no friction.
bullets: Configurable % per provider or per insurance
Auto-upsert when progressing a treatment plan service
Payouts grouped by monthly period (or customizable)
Immutable history: who progressed, when, which procedure
Commission per period — not per procedure (validated architectural decision)
Exportable to payroll (CSV/PDF) or direct processing

membership.title: Predictable MRR. Automatic recurring billing.
membership.description: Patients subscribe to monthly/yearly plan. Recurring billing via MercadoPago (CL/BR/AR/MX/CO/PE) happens on its own. Pre-charge reminders (7d/3d/0d) + escalated post-charge retry (D+1..D+7 daily, then weekly). 4 visible badge states: active, due soon, overdue, cancelled.
bullets: Monthly or yearly recurring billing (auto-renewal toggle)
MercadoPago MVP gateway — multi-gateway failover supported
Pre-charge reminders: WhatsApp + Email (7d / 3d / 0d)
Escalated post-charge retry: D+1, D+2, ... D+7, then W2/W3/W4
Idempotent webhook (no double charges)
AES-256-GCM encrypted credentials in the database
4 membership badge states: active / due soon / overdue / cancelled

solo.pain: End of month: you spend Sunday closing cash, calculating assistant's commission, sending payment links for monthly fees.
solo.benefit: Cash closes itself. Assistant commission goes with it. Patient monthly fee charges automatically with saved card. Free Sunday.

clinica.pain: 5 dentists with different commission. Calc error every 2 months. Forgotten membership fees.
clinica.benefit: Auto payout per provider + retro-fix via audit. Membership charges automatically and reminds the patient — without you.

rede.pain: Consolidate finance across 5 sites. Each one its own way. Manual reconciliation takes 1 week.
rede.benefit: Each site's cash closes overnight. Dashboard consolidates MRR + payouts + charges in real time. Accounting reconciliation in hours.

fechamento.before: Receptionist sums it all in Excel at night (30-60min/day).
fechamento.after: Cron closes automatically at 11pm. You review balance in the morning.

comissao.before: Monthly spreadsheet with risk of error per calc.
comissao.after: Auto-upsert as each service progresses. Immutable history.

cobranca.before: Manual link or forgotten. Patient pays when remembers.
cobranca.after: Automatic D-day charge via gateway. Saved card, no friction.

lembrete.before: Receptionist calls or forgets — high friction.
lembrete.after: Escalated WhatsApp + Email reminders (7d, 3d, day, retry). Idempotent.

mrr.before: Don't know how much comes in next month until day 30.
mrr.after: Dashboard shows projected MRR, churn rate, 30/60/90d retention.

items.q: Which payment gateways are supported?
items.a: MercadoPago is the current MVP, with coverage in CL, BR, AR, MX, CO and PE. Webpay (Chile) and Stripe (US/global) are on the near roadmap. You configure your credentials per organization — they're encrypted (AES-256-GCM) in the database.

items.q: How does failover between gateways work?
items.a: Multi-gateway support per practice with priority. If MercadoPago fails (instability, etc.), the system tries the next configured gateway. Idempotent webhook — no double charges even on retry.

items.q: Is commission per procedure or per period?
items.a: Per period (monthly). Architectural decision validated with founders — per-procedure commission creates complexity disproportionate to value (debate over who 'did' the step, etc.). You set % per provider or override per insurance. Payout closes monthly.

items.q: Are billing reminders spammy?
items.a: No. Cadence: 7d before (WhatsApp+Email), 3d before (same), the day (auto charge). Post-charge failure: D+1, D+2 ... D+7 daily, then W2, W3, W4 weekly, last admin_d30 (no auto-cancel). Idempotent — no duplicate sends if webhook fails.

items.q: Does the patient register a card on the kiosk or at the front desk?
items.a: Can be at the front desk (receptionist) or the patient portal (link sent via WhatsApp). Card is tokenized by the gateway — never touches our database. PCI compliance via gateway.

items.q: Is auto-billing in production?
items.a: Partially in production. It's active in STAGING for all practices. In production, it's enabled opt-in per practice while we monitor early metrics. Trial gives full access in staging — you can test with no risk.

items.q: Can I pause or disable a specific charge?
items.a: Yes. Each MembershipSubscription can be paused (keeps status but skips next charge) or cancelled (status = cancelled, keeps access until end of paid period). All auditable.

items.q: How does it work accounting-wise across multi-location networks?
items.a: Each site has its own cash, but Payouts and Memberships can be consolidated at the Network level for super-admin (network_finance). Separate cost center per site, consolidated MRR for executive reporting.

ctaFinal.title: Your practice bills on autopilot.
ctaFinal.sub: 14-day trial with full finance active in staging. Sales-led setup in 1 business day.
